friendly_name: P0 Test Failure Resolution — Release Blockers 1298-1305
purpose_context: 217+ pre-existing test failures were discovered and filed per DIR-013 during mission 01KSF9HJ. Four sub-clusters were tracked as P0 release blockers: #1301 (shared-package/events drift), #1305 (next CLI exit-code regressions), #1304 (doctrine/glossary anchor drift + tactic schema invalid), and #1303 (charter synthesizer manifest hash drift). This mission resolves all still-reproducing clusters on main with minimal fixes and regression coverage so the 3.2.0 baseline is clean.
purpose_tldr: Fix all P0 test failures blocking the 3.2.0 release across four issue clusters (events drift, next exit codes, doctrine anchors, charter synthesizer).
source_description: GitHub issues #1298 #1301 #1303 #1304 #1305 — P0 test failure clusters blocking 3.2.0 release, filed per DIR-013 during mission 01KSF9HJ.
